relative_path: 2. Methods & Experiments/Protocols/tCycIF_milky spots/Possible markers for CycIF.xlsx
full_text:
R2: Scope of milky spot tCycIF panel
R3: > to possibly find milky spot-like structures from benign/borderline omentum samples
R4: > different characteristics between milky spots and PDS omentum Lagg?
R5: > panel designed based on previous literature characterizing MS
R8: MARKER | TYPE | TARGET | WHY? | MILKY SPOTS | LAGG | iTLS | mTLS | LIMITATIONS | AVAILABLE | CHANNEL
R9: CD3 | Immune cell | T cells | to identify immune structures, helping LTi detection | +/-, scattered | +, scattered | +, zone | +, around GC | | yes | 555.0
R10: CD4 | Immune cell | T helper cells | to identify immune structures, to study T cell subtypes | +/-, scattered | +, scattered | +, zone | +, around GC | unspec. targeting to macrophages | yes | 488, 555
R11: CD8 | Immune cell | T cytotoxic cells | to identify immune structures, to study T cell subtypes | +/-, scattered | +, scattered | +, zone | +, around GC | | yes | 633.0
R12: CD20 | Immune cell | All B cells | to identify immune structures | most +, scattered | most +, scattered | +, zone | +, in GC | | yes | 633.0
R13: IBA-1 | Immune cell | All macrophages | to distinguish MS from Lagg | +, scattered | +/-, scattered | +, scattered | +, scattered | | yes | 488 750
R14: CD163 | Immune cell | M2-like macrophages | to study M1/M2 polarization states of macrophages (pro-/anti-inflammatory)?

attered | +, scattered | +, scattered | | yes | 488 750
R14: CD163 | Immune cell | M2-like macrophages | to study M1/M2 polarization states of macrophages (pro-/anti-inflammatory)? | +, scattered | +/-, scattered | +, scattered | +, scattered | may not be exlusive for M2-macrophages | yes | 488.0
R15: HLA-DPB2 (MHCII) | Immune cell | MHCII protein, in APCs (M1-macrophages, DCs, some B cells) | Essential for CD4+ activation. MS lack DCs (=no antigen presenting capability) > to distinguish MS from Lagg. | +/-, scattered | +/-, scattered | +/-, scattered | +/-, scattered | | yes | 555, 647
R16: CD21 | Immune cell | follicular dendritic cells | to differentiate iTLS from Lagg (might be expressed also in Lagg but should be weaker) | - | +/-, scattered | +, scattered | +, in GC | possibly in some B cells, might not express in all iTS (Sun 2024 rw) | yes | 647 488
R18: Vimentin | Stroma | Stromal cells | To compartmentalize stromal areas | | | | | | | 750.0
R19: PDPN | Stroma | Some stromal fibroblasts and fibroblasts in FRCs | to distinguish MS from Lagg | +/-, in FRCs around lymphocytes, less active than in Lagg (need to be checked from the literature) | +/-, scattered, weaker than in MS (or other way around, need to be checked) | + | + | unspec targeting to endothelial and epithelial cells, may be expressed in Lagg but should be weaker than in MS | no | 555 (new)

(or other way around, need to be checked) | + | + | unspec targeting to endothelial and epithelial cells, may be expressed in Lagg but should be weaker than in MS | no | 555 (new)
R20: CD31 | Stroma | Blood vessels/endothelial cells | To find blood vessels around immune structures | + | +. in the middle and borders | +, in borders | +, in borders | +, in borders | yes | 647.0
R21: HEV (MECA-79) | Stroma | High endothelial venules | to distinguish Lagg from other structures | most + | most - | +/- | + | | yes | 488.0
R23: Ki-67 | Functional | Proliferating cells/proliferation state | to find active cells, to possibly find Lagg that are maturating to iTLS and iTLS that are maturating to mTLS | +/-, scattered | +/-, scattered | +/-, scattered | +/-, in GC | | yes | 488 647
R24: PD1 (PDCD1) | Functional | PD-1 immune checkpoint on T cells | to investigate the immunosuppressivity of structures | +/-. scattered | +/-. scattered | +/-. scattered in T zone | +/-, scattered around GC | | yes | 647.0
R25: BCL6 | Transcription factor | Chemokine of GC | to identify GCs (=mTLS) | - | - | - | +/-, in GC | | yes | unconj

attered in T zone | +/-, scattered around GC | | yes | 647.0
R25: BCL6 | Transcription factor | Chemokine of GC | to identify GCs (=mTLS) | - | - | - | +/-, in GC | | yes | unconj
R26: RORyt | Transcription factor | LTi cells (these cells are CD3-), transcription factor | Lagg and TLS need LTi signalling but MS do not > to distinguish MS from Lagg | - | +, scattered | +, scattered | +, scattered | positive also in Th17- ja ILC3-cells | no | unconj (new)
R32: MARKERS NOT AVAILABLE IN THE LAB
R33: CD86
R34: CD23
R35: CXCL13
R36: CD43
R37: Podoplanin
R41: MARKER | TARGET CELL | TLS TARGET | CLONE | CHANNEL | NOTES
R42: CD3 (or CD4+CD8 mix) | T cells | MS+/-, scattered
Lagg+, scattered
iTLS+, zone
mTLS+, around GC | | CD4 488
CD8a 647 750?
CD3 555 | Is CD3 a poor marker?
CD4 may stain also some macrophages
CD3 or CD4 and CD8 separately in different channels? Let's check Lagg from tCycIF and decide then whether to have only CD3 or CD4 and CD8 separately
R44: CD20 | B cells | most MS+, scattered
most Lagg+, scattered
iTLS+, zone
mTLS+, around GC | | 647.0 | CD20 better than CD79a for targeting B cells
R46: CD21 | Follicular dendritic cells (FDC) | MS-
Lagg+/- , scattered
iTLS+, scattered
mTLS+, GC | | 647 488 | May stain in some level also other B cells than FDCs
Sun et al 2024 review: iTLS are CD21-, should we still drop this out? Do we have this in previous cycif panel?

C | | 647 488 | May stain in some level also other B cells than FDCs
Sun et al 2024 review: iTLS are CD21-, should we still drop this out? Do we have this in previous cycif panel?
R48: CD23 | Follicular dendritic cells (FDC) | MS-
Lagg-
iTLS-
mTLS+ | | | Typically thought that Lagg: CD21-CD23-, iTLS: CD21+CD23-, mTLS: CD21+CD23+
CD23 specific marker for mTLS (e.g. Vanhersecke et al. 2023)
R50: IBA-1 | Macrophages | always in MS+
Lagg+/-
iTLS+ 
mTLS+ | | 488 750 | Best marker for differentiating MS from Lagg
R52: MECA-79 | High endothelial venules | typically MS+
typically Lagg-
iTLS+/-
mTLS+ | | 488.0 | Can be used for differentiating Lagg from immature and mature TLS (together with some other markers)
R54: AID | Active germinal center B cells | MS-, 
Lagg-
iTLS-
mTLS+, GC | | 488.0 | Didn't work well in TLS-IDS tCycIF
R56: CXCL13 (should be justified) | B cell attracting chemokine | MS+/-
Lagg+/-
iTLS+
mTLS+ | | | Lower expression of iTLS than in mTLS. Yoshihara 2023 (PMID: 36880532) said in intro that CXCL13 is needed for MS development
R58: BCL6 | Chemokine of GC | MS-
Lagg-
iTLS-
mTLS+/-, GC | | rabbit 488 555 | Expression refer to mature TLS
R60: Ki-67 | Proliferating cells | MS+/-, 
Lagg +/-
iTLS+/-, scattered
mTLS+/-, in GC | | 488 555 647 | Ki-67 expression in GC refer to active GC/TLS
R62: CD163+CD206 (MRC1) mix | M2-like macrophages

rating cells | MS+/-, 
Lagg +/-
iTLS+/-, scattered
mTLS+/-, in GC | | 488 555 647 | Ki-67 expression in GC refer to active GC/TLS
R62: CD163+CD206 (MRC1) mix | M2-like macrophages
R64: CD86 + HLA-DR mix | M1-like macrophages | CD86 not available in the lab. Option to use pan-macrophage marker and M2-macrophage markers to separate M1 from M2 although not optimal
R66: BCL6 or Ki-67 | mTLS | CD23 would be the best (although not available in the lab) but these are options
R68: PD-1 | PD-1 | if Lagg (at least some of them) are PD1+, then it would be interesting to add this if we would find some difference between milky spots and Lagg
R70: Podoplanin | Fibroblasts | Does not make sense, contradictory info found. PDPN is expressed in FRCs (fibroblastic reticular (stromal) cells). FRCs are found in MS but not exclusively. Lagg may also have FRCs (PDPN+) but typically weaker than MS. iTLS and especially mTLS typically with high FRC prevalence
R71: | | > according to chatGPT, PDNP expression should be lower in innate vs. inflammation-induced milky spots
R73: CD19 | XXX
R75: CD43 | XXX
R77: tie2 | endothelial cells | Yoshihara 2023 (PMID: 36880532) found that tie2+Aldh1a2+ FRCs are specific for MS but cover only a subset of all MS --> thus not possibly useful markers for us
R78: Aldh1a2 | retionic acid-converting enzyme

532) found that tie2+Aldh1a2+ FRCs are specific for MS but cover only a subset of all MS --> thus not possibly useful markers for us
R78: Aldh1a2 | retionic acid-converting enzyme
R80: RORγt* | LTi cells (also ILC3, Th17 and some gammadelta T cells) | Lagg and TLS require LTi-mediated signalling for developing but Milky spots do not. > negative in milky spots, positive in others (Meza-Perez 2018)
R82: TNFa, IL-6 | inflammatory markers | could be used to separate innate=embryonic milky spots (less these) from inflammation-induced milky spots (more of these) > info from ChatGPT, some ref need to be found
R87: RORyt:
R88: LTi cells | RORyt+ CD3- CD4+
R89: Th17 | RORyt+ CD3+ CD4+
